audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:weak verb stem + -de/-te]] and [[grammar:gedurende + duration]]. Add [[grammar:-de]] or [[grammar:-te]] to the verb stem for many regular past-tense forms. Use [[grammar:gedurende]] before a duration to mean during or for the whole period.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:weak verb stem + -de/-te]]: The weak preterite suffix is selected phonologically; plural forms add -n.; [[grammar:gedurende + duration]]: [[grammar:Gedurende]] introduces a formal bounded duration and scopes over the event interval.

audienceSections.normal:
#### weak verb stem + -de/-te

Add [[grammar:-de]] or [[grammar:-te]] to the verb stem for many regular past-tense forms. Example: [[grammar:Hij opende zijn kraam in de ochtendmist.]]

#### gedurende + duration

Use [[grammar:gedurende]] before a duration to mean during or for the whole period. Example: [[grammar:Gedurende drie uur bleef de markt druk.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### weak verb stem + -de/-te

The weak preterite suffix is selected phonologically; plural forms add -n. Literal example: [[grammar:Hij opende zijn kraam in de ochtendmist.]]

#### gedurende + duration

[[grammar:Gedurende]] introduces a formal bounded duration and scopes over the event interval. Literal example: [[grammar:Gedurende drie uur bleef de markt druk.]]

audienceSections.normal: Regular weak past forms take [[grammar:-de]] or [[grammar:-te]] according to the final sound of the stem. The reading practices forms such as werkte, opende, regende, waaide, bezochten, and telde; verkocht is an irregular lexical past form rather than an example of this rule. [[grammar:Gedurende]] presents a bounded duration.
audienceSections.expert: Regular weak past forms take [[grammar:-de]] or [[grammar:-te]] according to the final sound of the stem. The reading practices forms such as werkte, opende, regende, waaide, bezochten, and telde; verkocht is an irregular lexical past form rather than an example of this rule. [[grammar:Gedurende]] presents a bounded duration.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Jaren geleden werkte Pieter als jonge marktkoopman.]] — Years ago Pieter worked as a young market trader.
- [[grammar:Hij opende zijn kraam in de ochtendmist.]] — He opened his stall in the morning mist.
- [[grammar:Milan hielp hem met de dozen.]] — Grandma Anja helped him with the boxes.
- [[grammar:Pieter verkocht brood en appels terwijl het regende.]] — Pieter sold bread and apples while it rained.
- [[grammar:Gedurende drie uur bleef de markt druk.]] — For three hours the market remained busy.
- [[grammar:De geur van koffie kwam uit een naburig café.]] — The smell of coffee came from a nearby café.
- [[grammar:Plotseling waaide een bord van de tafel.]] — Suddenly a sign blew off the table.
- [[grammar:Lotte hielp hem opnieuw, waardoor de kraam snel weer klaar was.]] — Grandma Anja helped him again, so the stall was quickly ready once more.
- [[grammar:Die dag telde Pieter vierhonderdtwintig bestellingen.]] — That day Pieter counted four hundred twenty orders.
- [[grammar:Pieter telde het geld en sloot de kassa.]] — Pieter counted the money and closed the register.
- [[grammar:Gedurende de middag werd het weer rustiger.]] — During the afternoon the weather became calmer.
- [[grammar:De drukte verdween pas tegen de avond.]] — The bustle disappeared only toward evening.
- [[grammar:Milan en Lotte luisteren aandachtig naar het verhaal.]] — Milan and Lotte listen carefully to the story.
- [[grammar:Lotte herkent de oude markt op de foto.]] — Grandma Anja recognizes the old market in the photograph.
- [[grammar:Pieter bewaart de herinnering omdat het zijn eerste werkdag was.]] — Pieter keeps the memory because it was his first workday.
- [[grammar:Hij glimlacht wanneer hij de geur van regen en koffie ruikt.]] — He smiles when he smells the scent of rain and coffee.
